title: Tunisian Stuffed Baked Goods
description: A sweet treat with a gooey center, inspired by the flavors of Tunisia. This dish is perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Spread the gooey chocolate spread evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border.
Sprinkle the roasted almonds and granulated sugar over the chocolate spread.
Fold the dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
